mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kb_tag ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_tag (name, color, create_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{color}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_tag SET name = #{name}, color = #{color} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM kb_tag t INNER JOIN kb_document_tag dt ON t.id = dt.tag_id WHERE dt.document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY t.id ASC
